acceptance_criteria: All notification kinds returned; types filter works; Notification.id is quoted string; account field is full Account object; pagination works
description:
Return paginated notifications for the authed account. Kinds: mention, favourite, reblog, follow, follow_request. Each includes the from account (full Account object) and optionally the related post (full Status object for mention/favourite/reblog). Params: max_id, since_id, min_id, limit, types[], exclude_types[].

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch /api/v1/notifications from mastodon.social and catalog the Notification object structure for each kind.

Test discipline:
- Create a mention → notification of kind=mention appears with correct post
- Create a favourite → notification of kind=favourite appears
- Filter types=['mention'] → only mention notifications returned
- exclude_types=['follow'] → follows excluded
- Notification.id is quoted string
- Each notification's account field is a full Account object

Defensive programming:
- Notification deduplication: if same actor performs same action twice, don't create duplicate notifications
- Mark read: GET should NOT automatically mark notifications as read (require explicit mark-all-read call)
title: Notifications timeline: all kinds, filter by type, pagination
